scenarioName: Generate a filesystem tree projection for review

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Generate a filesystem tree projection for review
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: A `report.md` or CLI output showing the successful generation of `docs/features/_FEATURE-QUALITY-TREE.txt` with content adhering to the specified criteria (product-owner surfaces only, quality state visible in filenames, safe to paste).
steps.observedResult: No `report.md` or CLI output was provided to verify the generation or content of the filesystem tree projection.
